_meta.purpose: 🆕 [governor Phase 4 E5 / Sir 2026-05-29 拍板] 思考脑红线 — LLM 不可碰的 4 类 (INTEGRITY/commitment/mark_important/safety sensor). actionable handler 前 check, 命中 → reject + actionable_result = 'red_line_violated:<line>', LLM 下轮看到学习.
_meta.philosophy: 准则 6 反硬编码: 红线规则 vocab 持久化 (不在 .py 写 if). 准则 5 言出必行: integrity 不可被 LLM 自己 disable. 准则 7 Sir 元否决: Sir 可改/加红线 (CLI 后续).
_meta.cli: scripts/red_lines_dump.py (TODO Phase 4 后续, 含 list/enable/disable/test)
_meta.v1_scope: v1 实施 2 类: integrity_disable + commitment_let_go. mark_important_concern + safety_sensor_threshold 留 V2 (现有 writable_paths whitelist 已 cover safety sensor).

integrity_disable._note: propose_protocol rule 含 (case-insensitive substring) 任一 phrase → red_line_violated. ClaimTracer 永远不可由 LLM 自决关 (Sir 元否决也只能 CLI 改 vocab disable=false).

commitment_let_go._note: _add_let_go_topic 入口 check: thread_id (或思考脑 thought.thread_id 关联) 含 active commitment_id / promise_id → red_line_violated. 用 PromiseLog 拿 active 列表. 防 LLM 自决放下真有 deadline 的承诺.

mark_important_concern._note: V2 实施: ageing/let_go Sir 标 important=True 的 concern → reject. 现 enabled=false (concern important flag 还没在 ConcernsLedger 实现).

safety_sensor_threshold._note: V2 实施 (但 β.6 fix44 现有 writable_paths whitelist 已 cover 大部分 — Sir 把 health_probe/commitment_watcher/chronos 阈值 不放 writable_paths 即可). 现 enabled=false. 后续如需更细颗粒 read_only list, 此处加.
